sequences.name: Cancellation Win-Back
sequences.description: Automated 5-touch win-back campaign for cancelled deals within 90 days

steps.body: Hi {{customer_first_name}}, this is {{rep_first_name}} from {{company_name}}. I saw your order was cancelled — totally understand. Is there anything I could have done differently? Would love your honest feedback.

steps.subject: We'd love a second chance, {{customer_first_name}}

steps.body: Hey {{customer_first_name}} — {{rep_first_name}} here. Quick heads up: we just launched a {{promo_offer}} for customers who come back this month. Thought of you. Want details?

steps.subject: {{customer_first_name}}, your neighbors are asking about you
steps.body:
Hi {{customer_first_name}},

Since we last spoke, {{street_sold_count}} more homes on {{street_name}} have signed up with {{company_name}}.

I wanted to give you one last heads-up before I close out your file. If you'd like to get back on board, I can honor your original quote price.

Reply YES and I'll reach out to schedule.

— {{rep_first_name}}

steps.subject: Closing out your file — one last thing
steps.body:
Hi {{customer_first_name}},

I'm closing out your file today. Before I do — if you ever want to revisit {{product_name}}, just reply to this email and I'll pick up right where we left off. No pressure ever.

Thank you for the time you gave me.

— {{rep_first_name}} at {{company_name}}

sequences.name: Referral Ask Sequence
sequences.description: Prompt happy customers to refer neighbors at the 14-day and 60-day mark

steps.body: Hey {{customer_first_name}}! Hope everything is going great with your {{product_name}}. Do you know any neighbors who might want the same? You both get {{referral_reward}} 🎁 Your link: {{referral_link}}

steps.subject: Know someone who'd love {{product_name}}?

sequences.name: Review Ask Sequence
sequences.description: Get Google reviews from happy customers at peak satisfaction moment

steps.body: Hi {{customer_first_name}}, {{rep_first_name}} here! Quick question — on a scale of 1–10, how's your {{product_name}} treating you? (Reply with a number)
That's awesome to hear! Would you mind leaving us a quick Google review? It helps our small team a lot 🙏 {{review_link}}
